text:
/ci1 1 ふふ、信用してもらえないようだね。
ま、それもやむなしか。

/ci1 1 こちらは君達が選んだ道だ。
立ちはだかる障害も、責任持って
君達の手で撃破したまえ。

/ci1 1 Heh, you seem reluctant to trust me.
Then again, I can hardly blame you.

/ci1 1 You chose this route for yourselves.
Take responsibility for your choice and
destroy everything that stands in your way.

ふふ、信用してもらえないようだね。
ま、それもやむなしか。

Heh, you seem reluctant to trust me.
Then again, I can hardly blame you.

You chose this route for yourselves. Take
responsibility for your choice and destroy
everything that stands in your way.
